svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.p: Native Integrations are fully built into Subathon Manager.
External Integrations are supported solely through external systems, and are processed as "External".
Partial Integrations are external integrations that have partial native support, in terms of configuration and naming.
Anything with a * are missing features that are planned but currently blocked, or solved via other means.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
